data.title: Fixure launches on Product Hunt to introduce Layer-5 Security Decision Intelligence, inviting security teams to public beta.
data.description: The public beta of Fixure is now available on Product Hunt for security teams, promoting a shift from simply reacting to alerts to making clear and justifiable decisions. The platform aims to assist security leaders and practitioners in transitioning towards making explainable and defensible choices. This launch provides an opportunity for the community to engage with Fixure's security decision intelligence tools. Interested individuals can access the beta version at the provided Product Hunt link.

data.title: Kyndryl expands AI skilling programs in India, training 50,000 students and 30,000 youth with AI skills.
data.description: In an effort to enhance its Corporate Social Responsibility (CSR) initiatives in India, Kyndryl (NYSE: KD) has revealed plans to provide AI skills training to a total of 80,000 individuals. This includes training for 50,000 students and 30,000 youth across the nation. The announcement was made in Bangalore on February 16, 2026. Kyndryl, a prominent provider of essential enterprise services, aims to significantly contribute to social development through this expanded commitment.

data.title: Global survey finds 60% of credit risk and fraud execs plan to invest in AI and Decision Intelligence for better decisions.
data.description: In Parsippany, N.J., a recent survey sponsored by Provenir, a leading AI-powered Decision Intelligence company, revealed that 60% of credit risk and fraud executives globally have identified AI and Decision Intelligence as their primary planned investments for the upcoming year. The survey highlighted that utilizing Generative AI for natural language queries was considered the most valuable AI feature by 51% of respondents, closely followed by real-time decision-making capabilities across customer touchpoints, which garnered 49% of the vote.

data.title: C3is Inc. (Nasdaq: CISS) will release Q4 results on Feb 19, 2026, for the period ended Dec 31, 2025.
data.description: On February 16, 2026, in Athens, Greece, C3is Inc. (Nasdaq: CISS), a company specializing in seaborne transportation services, revealed its plan to disclose fourth quarter financial results for the period ending on December 31, 2025. The report is scheduled to be made public before the opening of the market in New York on February 19, 2026.

data.title: Choose water-efficient kitchen & bath products to save water & increase home value. Plumbing Mfrs Intl promotes eco-certified choices.
data.description: Plumbing Manufacturers Int'l is urging consumers in Orlando, Florida, to opt for certified water-efficient kitchen and bath products amidst a wide array of choices available. This move aims to promote sustainability and conservation of water resources, emphasizing the importance of mindful consumption. Taking into consideration the significance of this initiative, it is vital for consumers to prioritize products that bear water efficiency certifications to contribute towards a more sustainable future.

data.title: Private aviation industry consolidation poses flight safety concerns due to financial pressures. U.S. aviation issues urge focus on discipline and safety.
data.description: The private aviation industry is experiencing consolidation due to increasing financial and operational challenges. This has raised concerns about flight safety, with recent disruptions in the U.S. prompting travelers to prioritize factors such as operational discipline, safety measures, and transparency over brand recognition.

data.title: Stonewall Group acquires Architectural Alliance in Delaware, founded in 1987 with offices in DE and PA, expanding its reach.
data.description: The Stonewall Group, a prominent national architecture firm, has recently formed a partnership with Architectural Alliance, Inc., an esteemed architectural design company located in Wilmington, Delaware, also operating from an office in Exton, Pennsylvania. Established in 1987, Architectural Alliance is known for providing innovative architectural services tailored to clients' needs in various sectors such as commercial, residential, institutional, historic preservation, and ADA compliance. This collaboration brings together two influential firms to expand their reach and expertise in the industry.

data.title: New Winter Storm impacts US and Europe. Raythink's AI-Powered Thermal Cameras secure communities amidst snow, freezing rain, and dense fog.
data.description: In YANTAI, China on Feb. 16, 2026, ongoing winter weather is causing disruptions in the United States and Europe, with snow, freezing rain, and dense fog affecting operations. Raythink emphasized its crucial role in addressing these challenges, with important numbers to be provided.

data.title: First Ascent Biomedical opens FPM Cancer Lab in Miami, accepting patient referrals. Eligible colorectal cancer patients may qualify for sponsored testing.
data.description: A laboratory in Miami is currently open to receiving referrals from patients and physicians. Residents of Florida, as well as colorectal cancer patients across the country, may be eligible for special programs covering the expenses of testing. On February 16, 2026, First Ascent Biomedical revealed the launch of these programs.

data.title: BayCare appoints Robert Carvajal as new CISO to oversee cybersecurity strategy. Feb 16, 2026.
data.description: In Clearwater, Florida on February 16, 2026, BayCare introduced Robert Carvajal, CISSP, as the new chief information security officer (CISO). Carvajal will lead BayCare's cybersecurity efforts, aiding the health system’s ongoing emphasis on safeguarding information.

data.title: Crypto's CLARITY Act swiftly cleared House in June 2025; Senate facing delays in passing the framework.
data.description: The CLARITY Act passed swiftly through the House of Representatives after its introduction in June 2025, but has encountered setbacks in the Senate, causing delays in its progress.
Poll: BoE to cut bank rate to 3.25% by end-September and to stay there until at least end-2026, median forecast

data.title: 50% of risk prevention executives globally struggle to detect/respond to new fraud trends, says study by Provenir.
data.description: A recent survey sponsored by Provenir, a global AI-powered Decision Intelligence leader, revealed that 50% of credit risk and fraud executives find their most significant challenge in application fraud strategy to be swift detection and response to emerging fraud trends. With fraudsters leveraging new technologies, organizations are under pressure to stay ahead of increasingly sophisticated threats while also maintaining customer trust.

data.title: Homebuyer down payments decreased to $64,000 in December, down 1.5% year over year, first decline in 5 months - Redfin.
data.description: In Seattle, the median down payment for U.S. homebuyers decreased by 1.5% year over year to $64,000 in December, marking the first decline in five months. This data comes from a recent report by Redfin, a real estate brokerage partner of Rocket. Although the median home sale price rose slightly by 0.5% during the same period, down payments decreased in dollar value due to homebuyers putting down a lower percentage of the purchase price compared to the previous year. The average percentage of the purchase price put down by typical homebuyers also declined in December.
